title: Nashik Flash Flood
description: Severe flash flooding following heavy monsoon downpour has inundated low-lying residential areas in Nashik city. The Godavari River has breached its banks near Ramkund Ghat, displacing thousands of civilians. Schools and ground-floor residences are submerged up to 4 feet. Rescue boats are needed urgently.

title: Pune Multi-Storey Building Collapse
description: A 7-storey residential apartment building has partially collapsed in the Bibwewadi neighbourhood of Pune due to suspected foundation failure triggered by waterlogging. An estimated 60-80 residents are trapped under debris. Heavy machinery and Rapid Action Force teams are required immediately. Gas leakages reported in the vicinity.

title: Aurangabad Highway Road Blockage
description: A massive landslide triggered by continuous heavy rainfall has completely blocked the NH-52 national highway connecting Aurangabad to Jalgaon. Approximately 200 vehicles including ambulances and supply trucks are stranded. A section of retaining wall has collapsed over a 300-metre stretch. Risk of secondary slides remains high.
infrastructure_damage: Telecom towers down in 3 km radius
